<div class="col-md-3 article-toc d-none d-md-block">
= Contents =
  - [[#Blender Cycles|Blender Cycles]]
    - [[#Blender Cycles#着色器|着色器]]
    - [[#Blender Cycles#结点工具|结点工具]]
    - [[#Blender Cycles#光源|光源]]
    - [[#Blender Cycles#渲染|渲染]]

</div>
<div class="col-md-9 article-main">
%template article_template
=Blender Cycles =
==着色器==
在材质-面选项，结合节点面板组合使用
==结点工具==

==光源==
三点光源系统从强到弱：背光，主光源，补光
==渲染==
